The Python code correctly checks the three conditions from the Coq spec: (1) sorted order via pairwise comparison (matching Sorted Z.le), (2) uniqueness via set comparison (matching NoDup), and (3) same element membership via set equality (matching the bidirectional In predicate). All three checks produce the same concrete results as the Coq specification for any concrete list inputs.
